bead.title: B22d-a: grade.go switches r.Run(RunOptions{}) → r.runInternal(RunArgs{})
bead.description:
Step a/h of B22d decomposition (worker analysis 2026-04-26).

Switch the single r.Run(RunOptions{...}) call in cli/internal/agent/grade.go to r.runInternal(RunArgs{...}) via the existing dispatch seam from B22a (ddx-dd640c18).

In-scope:
- cli/internal/agent/grade.go (one call site, ~10 LoC)

Out-of-scope:
- All other files (siblings B22d-b through B22d-h cover them)
bead.acceptance: field RunOptions removed from cli/internal/agent/grade.go. field CompareOptions removed from cli/internal/agent/grade.go. field QuorumOptions removed from cli/internal/agent/grade.go. cd cli && go build ./... passes. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... passes.
